product.name: Paper Towel Dispenser Wall Mount Commercial, Brushed Stainless Steel & Fingerprint Resistant, Lockable, for c fold/Multifold/Trifold Paper Towels, Touchless Hand Towels Holder
features: LARGE CAPACITY - Dispenses 400 c-fold, tri-fold, z-fold, multifold paper towels. Measures 11.2" width by 14.6" height by 4" depth
FINGERPRINT-PFROOF - Featuring an anti-fingerprint finish, Our c-fold paper towel dispenser stays spotless and shiny like new—no constant wiping required
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Brushed stainless steel, thicker material, easy to clean and anti-rust, provide long-lasting strength and use
QUICK INSTALLATION - Wall mount installation type, need screw accessories to put in the wall, also come with all the installation hardware

VERSATILE USE - A perfect accessory for any high traffic restroom in both commercial and public entities, including offices, restaurants, breakrooms, hospitals, healthcare facilities, schools, rest areas and more
